description_long: This is a two-story stone house with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in dark slate tiles. The front facade features a symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors, including two large rectangular windows, a smaller window above, a main entry door, and a wide wooden garage door. The stonework is uniform and gray, with subtle textural variation, and the window and door frames are accented with lighter stone trim. The side elevations are plain, with no windows or doors, and the rear mirrors the front but with a different door and window arrangement. A single chimney rises from one end of the roof, adding to the traditional European appearance. The overall design is solid and functional, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A traditional two-story stone house with a steep gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a wooden garage door. The facade is gray stone with lighter trim and a single chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two large windows, a smaller upper window, and a wide wooden garage door.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain stone wall with no windows or doors and the gable roof peak.
description_view_2: Rear view with a similar window and door arrangement as the front, but with a different door placement and no garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a plain stone wall and the chimney at the roof peak.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple rectangular door with stone trim, no porch or overhang, adjacent to a large garage door.
